title: v1.0.88 Beta — Question Bank Overhaul
description: You're on the bleeding edge! This beta release brings a complete overhaul of the Question Bank, fixing source badges, multi-source support, and layout issues.
features:
📚 Question Bank: Multi-Source Badges Fixed
Questions with both Kaplan and BPP references now correctly display separate gold badges side by side (e.g., Kaplan (Sec A) and BPP (Sec A)).

🏷️ Section Badge Layout Fixed
The section label (§ A, § B) no longer corrupts into broken characters. It now cleanly shows inside the source badge as Kaplan (Sec A).

✏️ Edit Modal: All Sources Load Correctly
Opening Edit on a multi-source question now loads ALL source references (Kaplan + BPP) into the editor — previously only the first source was shown.

📝 Smart Reference Display
If a question has no custom text, the reference is automatically shown in the card body (e.g. [Kaplan (Sec A)] 114) so nothing is ever left blank.

🧹 Mixed Sources Filter
A new Mixed Sources option in the source filter lets you quickly find all questions that span multiple question banks.
